info.title: FluentCRM API
info.description: Complete REST API documentation for FluentCRM — a self-hosted email marketing and CRM plugin for WordPress.

get.description: Retrieve auto-subscribe settings for user registration, comments, user syncing, and role-based tagging. Optionally includes form field definitions. When WooCommerce is active, also returns checkout form subscribe settings.

parameters.name: with[]
parameters.description: Include additional data. Use `fields` to include form field definitions for the settings UI.

200.description: Auto-subscribe settings for all subscription sources.

registration_setting.description: Settings for auto-subscribing users on WordPress registration.

comment_settings.description: Settings for auto-subscribing users when they comment.

user_syncing_settings.description: Settings for syncing existing WordPress users.

role_based_tagging_settings.description: Settings for applying tags based on WordPress user roles.

registration_fields.description: Form field definitions for registration settings (only when `with[]=fields`).

comment_fields.description: Form field definitions for comment settings (only when `with[]=fields`).

user_syncing_fields.description: Form field definitions for user syncing settings (only when `with[]=fields`).

role_based_tagging_settings_fields.description: Form field definitions for role-based tagging (only when `with[]=fields`).

woo_checkout_fields.description: WooCommerce checkout subscribe form fields (only when WooCommerce is active).

woo_checkout_settings.description: WooCommerce checkout subscribe settings (only when WooCommerce is active).

ApplicationPasswords.name: Authorization
ApplicationPasswords.description: WordPress Application Passwords — use Basic auth with your WordPress username and an application password in the format: username:application_password
